covers: held-guard residual fix (task-spor-queue-held-guard-residual-reference-and-priority-front): a bare relates-to/derived-from reference is NOT a held outcome (fix a) so a referenced task ranks do even with churn-level front (task-ref-churn), and a REAL decided-in outcome whose front sits at the two-write floor (a create + a lone priority bump) is NOT held (fix b) so the live-repro shape (task-repro: relates-to reference + priority bump) and the floor case (task-outcome-floor) both rank do, never triage
